overview: Live Now Recovery is a privacy-first, real-time marketplace for Medication-Assisted Treatment (MAT) provider availability in Ohio. Built on ICP with a Motoko backend and React/TypeScript/Tailwind frontend, it features real-time provider status, Sentinel risk prediction, a community citizen reporting layer, peer support testimonials, and a comprehensive admin dashboard for health system analytics.
features: Real-time MAT provider map with MapLibre GL JS clustering and heatmap
Sentinel Prediction Engine with NWS weather, Census ACS social stress, payday cycle logic
Citizen community reporting — live map layer boosting Sentinel risk scores
Share My Story peer support testimonials on recovery account pages
Full citizens community hub page with live feed, embedded map, and stats
Comprehensive admin dashboard with 8 tabs including provider management, report moderation, testimonials, and fiscal impact odometer
ElevenLabs accessibility integration — text-to-speech, ambient music, language selector
Fiscal Impact Engine with 7-Attempts model and live healthcare savings odometer
Recovery Intelligence Dashboard with B2B analytics at /dashboard
Cost Plus Rx referral tracking with QR codes on provider pages
